summary: Iteration 67: Multi-Cultural Star Chart - All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Star Chart page loads with World Skies button showing all 8 cultures (Mayan, Egyptian, Aboriginal, Lakota, Chinese, Vedic, Norse, Polynesian). Each culture can be selected and renders constellation overlays on the 3D star chart with correct colors and labels. Trade Circle and Analytics pages also verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 verified multi-cultural Star Chart with 8 cultures. Backend: GET /api/star-chart/cultures returns all 8 cultures (mayan, egyptian, australian, lakota, chinese, vedic, norse, polynesian). Each culture endpoint returns 5 constellations with complete mythology data. Frontend: World Skies button in Star Chart toolbar opens culture picker showing all 8 cultures. Selecting a culture renders constellation overlays on 3D star chart with culture-specific colors (Vedic=#FF9800, Norse=#90CAF9, Polynesian=#26C6DA). Overlay indicator shows 'X Sky - 5 patterns | Tap to explore stories'. Trade Circle at /trade-circle and Analytics at /analytics both load correctly.

backend_api.GET /api/star-chart/cultures/vedic: ✓ Returns 5 Vedic constellations (Sapta Rishi, Rohini, Mrigashira, Magha, Swati)
backend_api.GET /api/star-chart/cultures/norse: ✓ Returns 5 Norse constellations (Thor's Wagon, Odin's Eye, Freyja's Distaff, Fenrir, Bifrost)
backend_api.GET /api/star-chart/cultures/polynesian: ✓ Returns 5 Polynesian constellations (Hokule'a, Matariki, Newe, Manaiakalani, Ka Iwikuamoo)
backend_api.constellation_structure: ✓ All constellations have id, name, culture_name, ra, dec, stars, lines, element, mythology
backend_api.mythology_structure: ✓ All mythologies have figure, origin, deity, story, lesson

frontend_ui.world_skies_button: ✓ Shows in toolbar, opens culture picker
frontend_ui.culture_picker_panel: ✓ Shows all 8 cultures with names, colors, descriptions
frontend_ui.vedic_culture_selection: ✓ Renders orange (#FF9800) constellation overlays with labels
frontend_ui.norse_culture_selection: ✓ Renders light blue (#90CAF9) constellation overlays with labels
frontend_ui.polynesian_culture_selection: ✓ Renders cyan (#26C6DA) constellation overlays with labels
frontend_ui.culture_overlay_indicator: ✓ Shows 'X Sky - 5 patterns | Tap to explore stories'
frontend_ui.trade_circle_page: ✓ Loads at /trade-circle with Browse/My Listings/My Offers tabs
